TypeDoesNotContainNull.code: throw new \Exception("Your email is not recognised", 1)

PossiblyFalseArgument.code: json_encode(value: [ 'title' => 'New Notification', 'body' => $message, 'url' => $url, // Change the URL to where the user should be redirected 'icon' => getenv(name: 'APP_LOGO') ])

UndefinedFunction.code: msgError(400, "Password must be at least 6 characters.")
